# Tri-State Roofing & Construction

Tri-State Roofing & Construction is a premier roofing and construction contractor serving the Tri-State area including Quincy, IL, Hannibal, MO, and Keokuk, IA. Family-owned and operated since 2005, Tri-State offers top-tier residential and commercial roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors, and custom decks.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: 217-222-7663 (217-222-ROOF)
- **Email**: tylertristateroofing@gmail.com
- **Address**: 3411 Melody LN, Quincy, IL 62305 (Office address: 2400 N 30th St, Quincy, IL 62305)
- **Hours**: 
  - Monday - Friday: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM
  - Saturday: 8:00 AM - 12:00 PM
  - 24/7 Emergency Service Available

## Key Services

### Residential Roofing
- Professional installation of Owens Corning shingles, standing seam metal roofs (26-gauge steel, multiple colors), and flat roofs.
- Owens Corning Preferred Contractor with 50-year material warranty options.
- Thorough cleanup including magnetic nail sweeps.

### Commercial Roofing
- Certified installers for TPO, EPDM, PVC, modified bitumen, and standing seam metal.
- Energy-efficient reflective coatings and preventative maintenance.

### Siding Solutions
- Premium vinyl siding, James Hardie Fiber Cement, and 26-gauge board and batten metal siding.
- Soffit and fascia repairs included.

### Seamless Gutters
- 5-inch and 6-inch K-style seamless aluminum gutters fabricated on-site.
- Leaf guard protection and downspout management.

### Decks & Additions
- Custom decks using composite (Trex) or wood.
- Custom railing systems and full code compliance/permitting.

### Windows & Doors
- Energy Star rated double and triple-pane replacement windows.

## Areas Served
- **Illinois**: Quincy, Liberty, and surrounding areas.
- **Missouri**: Hannibal, Palmyra, and surrounding areas.
- **Iowa**: Keokuk, and surrounding areas.
